description: As a fisheries oceanographer at the NOAA Northeast Fisheries Science Center, conduct a winter habitat boundary assessment for the Northwest Atlantic pelagic fishery. Using Panoply and the NOAA OI SST data in ~/PanoplyData/, perform the thermal front analysis to locate the Gulf Stream front and extract temperatures as detailed in the request at ~/Desktop/gulfstream_habitat_request.txt. Deliver the report and all required output files to the directories specified in the request document.
